item.description: ### Fixed - **Codex "finished" notifications now show what the session actually said.** With Codex's "Approve for me" mode on, the notification could show a raw blob of internal approval data (`{"outcome":"allow"…}`) instead of the assistant's closing message. Perch now reads the message from the session itself — never from the approval machinery — and finds it reliably even for sessions that have been running for days.
